answer:
{"tool": "python_exec", "arguments": {
"code": "import itertools as it, math\n\
m, n = 2, 3 # replace with desired values\n\
pairs = set()\n\
for i, j in it.product(range(m), range(n)):\n\
 v = [i, j]\n\
 f = lambda x, y: (math.floor((x + y * m) % m), math.floor((x + y * m + n) % m))\n\
 f_v = f(i, j)\n\
 if f_v in pairs or (i, j) == f_v:\n\
  break\n\
 pairs.add(f_v)\n\
 if len(pairs) == m * n:\n\
  print(m, n)\n\
  print(pairs)\n"
}}
